## Checklist
- [ ] Code follows the project's layered architecture (Controller -> Service -> Repository)
- [ ] DTOs used for request/response, entities not exposed directly
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or hardcoded config committed
- [ ] `.env` / local properties file not staged (`git status` checked)
- [ ] Tested locally
- [ ] No unrelated changes mixed into this PR
